text:
Created attachment 244583
Screenshot: the word 'Colophon' only temporarily invisible

(In reply to Sergio Carlavilla Delgado from comment #2)

Sorry for not providing this. It took a (very) slow back seat. 


(In reply to Sergio Carlavilla Delgado from comment #3)

Confirmed fixed (at least, in the left sidebar). Big thanks. 


(In reply to comment #0)

> … partially obscured link to 'FreeBSD Glossary' can become completely 
> obscured (by, for example, the URL hint that's integral to Firefox). 
> 
> The link to 'Colophon' is completely invisible. …

No longer true; 'Colophon' can be scrolled into sight, then invisible only whilst obscured by e.g. the URL hint (screenshot attached).
